title: pelargonium × atropurpureum
intro: Pelargonium × atropurpureum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a hybrid species of pelargonium that belongs to the family Geraniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which are attributed to its high concentration of citronellal and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × atropurpureum include relief from sore throats, coughs, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to help reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
